## All pins (13)
  NUM   NAME                 TYPE         DESCRIPTION
     2  RF-IN                input        RF signal input (pad 2). Connects to RF input and to ground via L1. Optional 100pF blocking capacitor may be added in series before C2 for extra DC isolation.
     8  RF-OUT/DC-IN         bidirectional Combined RF output and DC supply input (pad 8). RF output exits via C3 (100pF DC block). VDD supplied via L2 (39nH RF choke). Both functions share this single pad.
     0  GND (Paddle)         gnd          Exposed thermal and electrical ground paddle on bottom of package. Both thermal and electrical ground — primary current return and heat dissipation path.
     1  NC                   passive      No internal connection (pad 1). Not used internally. Connected to ground on Mini-Circuits characterization test board.
     3  NC                   passive      No internal connection (pad 3). Not used internally. Connected to ground on characterization test board.

## All pins (13)
  NUM   NAME                 TYPE         DESCRIPTION
     2  RF-IN                input        RF signal input (pad 2). Connects to RF input and to ground via L1. Optional 100pF blocking capacitor may be added in series before C2 for extra DC isolation.
     8  RF-OUT/DC-IN         bidirectional Combined RF output and DC supply input (pad 8). RF output exits via C3 (100pF DC block). VDD supplied via L2 (39nH RF choke). Both functions share this single pad.
     0  GND (Paddle)         gnd          Exposed thermal and electrical ground paddle on bottom of package. Both thermal and electrical ground — primary current return and heat dissipation path.
     1  NC                   passive      No internal connection (pad 1). Not used internally. Connected to ground on Mini-Circuits characterization test board.

  NUM   NAME                 TYPE         DESCRIPTION
     1  CLK                  input        Serial Clock Input. Data is latched into the 32-bit shift register on the rising edge of CLK.
     2  DATA                 input        Serial Data Input. Data loaded MSB first. The 3 LSBs identify the register address.
     3  LE                   input        Load Enable Input. Rising edge of LE latches the shift register contents into the selected register.
     4  CE                   input        Chip Enable. Logic-low powers down the device; charge pump becomes high impedance. In low-power mode all blocks except SPI are off.
     5  SW                   passive      Fast-Lock Switch. Connect to loop filter when using fast-lock mode. No connect in normal mode.
     6  VCC_CP               power        Power Supply for Charge Pump.
     7  CP_OUT               output       Charge-Pump Output. Current-output node that drives the external loop filter.
     8  GND_CP               gnd          Ground for Charge Pump.
     9  GND_PLL              gnd          Ground for PLL.
    10  VCC_PLL              power        Power Supply for PLL.
    11  GND_RF               gnd          Ground for RF Outputs.
    12  RFOUTA_P             output       Open Collector Positive RF Output A. Differential positive output. Fundamental VCO ÷ DIVA.
    13  RFOUTA_N             output       Open Collector Negative RF Output A. Differential negative output.
    14  RFOUTB_P             output       Open Collector Positive RF Output B. Differential positive output. BDIV=0: same frequency as RFOUTA; BDIV=1: VCO fundamental frequency.
    15  RFOUTB_N             output       Open Collector Negative RF Output B. Differential negative output.
    16  VCC_RF               power        Power Supply for RF Output and Dividers. Also serves as DC bias supply for open-collector RF outputs via 27nH chokes.
    17  VCC_VCO              power        VCO Power Supply.
    18  GND_VCO              gnd          Ground for VCO.
    19  NOISE_FILT           passive      VCO Noise Decoupling. Internal VCO bias node that must be externally decoupled.
    20  TUNE                 input        VCO Control Voltage Input. Driven by the output of the external PLL loop filter. Compliance range: 0.5V to 2.5V.
    21  GND_TUNE             gnd          Ground for VCO Control Input.
    22  RSET                 passive      Charge-Pump Current Range Input. External resistor to GND sets the minimum CP current: ICP = 1.63V/RSET × (1 + CP[3:0]).
    23  BIAS_FILT            passive      VCO Bias Decoupling. Internal VCO bias filter node.
    24  REG                  passive      Reference Voltage Compensation. Internal bandgap/reference decoupling node.
    25  LD                   output       Lock Detect Output. Behaviour set by LD[1:0] bits (Reg5 bits 23:22): 01=digital lock detect, 10=analog lock detect (open-drain), 00=always low, 11=always high.
    26  RFOUT_EN             input        RF Output Enable (hardware). Logic-low disables both RFOUTA and RFOUTB regardless of register settings.
    27  GND_DIG              gnd          Ground for Digital Circuitry.
    28  VCC_DIG              power        Power Supply for Digital Circuitry. Also provides the internal bias level VCC_DIG/2 for the REF_IN input.
    29  REF_IN               input        Reference Frequency Input. High-impedance CMOS inverter with internal bias at VCC_DIG/2. Input range 10–200MHz (or 10–100MHz with reference doubler DBR=1). In shutdown, input is high-impedance.
    30  MUX_OUT              output       Multiplexed Output / Serial Data Out. Function selected by MUX[3:0] (Reg2 bits 28:26 + Reg5 bit18 MSB). Options: high-Z, D_VDD, D_GND, R-divider output, N-divider/2, analog lock detect, digital lock detect, or Register-6 readback (MUX=1100).
    31  GND_SD               gnd          Ground for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
    32  VCC_SD               power        Power Supply for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
    EP  EP                   gnd          Exposed Pad. Thermal and ground pad on the bottom of the package. Must be soldered to PCB ground plane for proper electrical and thermal performance.

  NUM   NAME                 TYPE         DESCRIPTION
     1  CLK                  input        Serial Clock Input. Data is latched into the 32-bit shift register on the rising edge of CLK.
     2  DATA                 input        Serial Data Input. Loaded MSB first; the 3 LSBs identify the register address.
     3  LE                   input        Load Enable. Rising edge latches shift register contents into the addressed register.
     4  CE                   input        Chip Enable. Logic-low powers down the device; charge pump goes high-impedance. All blocks except SPI are off in low-power mode.
     5  SW                   passive      Fast-Lock Switch. Connect to loop filter mid-point (between R2A and R2B) when using fast-lock mode. No connect in normal operation.
     6  VCC_CP               power        Power Supply for Charge Pump.
     7  CP_OUT               output       Charge-Pump Output. Current-source/sink output that drives the external loop filter.
     8  GND_CP               gnd          Ground for Charge Pump.
     9  GND_PLL              gnd          Ground for PLL.
    10  VCC_PLL              power        Power Supply for PLL.
    11  GND_RF               gnd          Ground for RF Outputs.
    12  RFOUTA_P             output       Open Collector Positive RF Output A. Differential output. Output power set by APWR[1:0] in Reg4: 00=−4dBm, 01=−1dBm, 10=+2dBm, 11=+5dBm.
    13  RFOUTA_N             output       Open Collector Negative RF Output A. Differential complement of RFOUTA_P.
    14  RFOUTB_P             output       Open Collector Positive RF Output B. BDIV=0 (Reg4 bit9): same frequency as RFOUTA. BDIV=1: VCO fundamental frequency.
    15  RFOUTB_N             output       Open Collector Negative RF Output B. Differential complement of RFOUTB_P.
    16  VCC_RF               power        Power Supply for RF Output and Dividers. Also serves as DC bias supply for all four open-collector RF output pins via 27nH RF chokes.
    17  VCC_VCO              power        VCO Power Supply.
    18  GND_VCO              gnd          Ground for VCO.
    19  NOISE_FILT           passive      VCO Noise Decoupling. Internal VCO bias node requiring external decoupling.
    20  TUNE                 input        VCO Control Voltage Input. Connected to the output of the external loop filter. Compliance range 0.5V–2.5V. Internal 3-bit ADC monitors this voltage for VCO autoselect.
    21  GND_TUNE             gnd          Ground for VCO Control Input.
    22  RSET                 passive      Charge-Pump Current Range Input. External resistor to GND sets CP current: ICP = 1.63V/RSET × (1 + CP[3:0]).
    23  BIAS_FILT            passive      VCO Bias Filter. Internal VCO bias decoupling node.
    24  REG                  passive      Reference Voltage Compensation. Internal bandgap reference decoupling node.
    25  LD                   output       Lock Detect Output. Behaviour set by LD[1:0] in Reg5 bits 23:22. 01=digital lock detect (push-pull), 10=analog lock detect (open-drain), 00=always low, 11=always high.
    26  RFOUT_EN             input        RF Output Enable (hardware). Logic-low disables both RFOUTA and RFOUTB regardless of register settings.
    27  GND_DIG              gnd          Ground for Digital Circuitry.
    28  VCC_DIG              power        Power Supply for Digital Circuitry. Also sets the internal bias level VCC_DIG/2 for the REF_IN input.
    29  REF_IN               input        Reference Frequency Input. High-impedance CMOS inverter with internal DC bias at VCC_DIG/2. Range 10–200MHz (100MHz max with doubler). High-impedance in shutdown.
    30  MUX_OUT              output       Multiplexed Output / Serial Data Out. Function set by MUX[3:0] (Reg2 bits 28:26 + Reg5 bit18 MSB). Options: tri-state, D_VDD, D_GND, R-divider, N-divider/2, analog LD, digital LD, or Reg6 readback (MUX=1100).
    31  GND_SD               gnd          Ground for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
    32  VCC_SD               power        Power Supply for Sigma-Delta Modulator.
    EP  EP                   gnd          Exposed Pad. Thermal and electrical ground pad. Must be soldered to PCB ground plane.
